channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: ME's Custom Mod Downloader
item.description: Servers distribute their own custom mods straight to joining clients, consent-gated, hash-verified.

item.title: Equus: Wild Horses 2.0
item.description: Adds tameable wild horses to the game, successor to Equus: Wild Horses

item.title: Dragonia Translations
item.description: Переводы и отредактированные переводы под стиль сервера.

item.title: Eternal Seraph: Poklyk
item.description: Calling progression system where specializations emerge from player actions

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Eternal Seraph Patch
item.description: Патч для серверу Вічний Серафим. Patch for the server Eternal Seraph.

item.title: xSkills Gilded Fork
item.description: This mod adds a beautifully designed, immersive, and user-friendly interface for xSkills.

item.title: xLib Fork
item.description: XLib provides an interface to add skills, abilities and effects to the game.

item.title: xSkills Fork
item.description: RPG-style skill system with abilities, perks, and progression.

item.title: Eternal Seraph: Backpacks
item.description: Yes. New backpacks again.

item.title: Biomes
item.description: All biomes/bioregions in one world

item.title: Vampirism
item.description: Become a creature of the night, drink blood, see in the dark and never touch silver again

item.title: Locusts for all
item.description: Allows all classes to be able to use the tuning spear to tame multiple locusts and offer more tweaks

item.title: Mah Boi Hammering
item.description: This mod simply replaces the infuriatingly annoying helve hammer and hammer sound with a much better

item.title: Dead
item.description: Leaves a lootable corpse of the player (with their exact skin and worn gear) at the death spot

item.title: Respawn Black Screen Fix
item.description: Fixes the black screen issue after a player respawn

item.title: Freshness Overlay
item.description: Shows freshness of food and hides.

item.title: Prospecting Scan
item.description: Prospecting Scan is a lightweight quality-of-life mod for Vintage Story that helps you find ore fast

item.title: Vanilla More Molds 2.1.2
item.description: Adds new molds while staying true to the spirit and mechanics of the base game!

item.title: Fanloid Fantweaks
item.description: Misc patches.

item.title: Roleplay Character Creator
item.description: Classic choose-your-own-adventure style character creator for Vintage Story. Server authored!

item.title: Skaven/Rat Player Model
item.description: Adds a Skaven/Rat player model to the game it uses Player Model Lib by Maltiez!

item.title: Regalia
item.description: Fancy clothing items for all seraphs, craftable by skilled tailors

item.title: Animalica - Body Tools & Classes
item.description: Adds wearable claws, fangs, body tools, and animal classes for Fox, Wolf, and Hyena for now

item.title: Fast Travel NPC
item.description: Allows players to fast travel in the world by paying rusty gears.

item.title: Soup Man
item.description: Summon Soup Man: keep a full pot nearby, or endure his desperate cries for soup.

item.title: FuelRework
item.description: Increases the burn time of most fuels.

item.title: Easy Building
item.description: A simple mod where you get a bit more blocks and items from crafting!

item.title: Olivine Fraud
item.description: Get easy olivine with this one simple trick!

item.title: Footprints
item.description: Animals and Players leave footprints when moving.
